cover.subtitle:
경공업에서 IMF까지,
한 세대의 경제사.
cover.imagePrompt: Contemporary Korean minimal illustration. Gray, red, blue simple palette. Suits, military uniforms, civilian clothing. Gwanghwamun, National Assembly, democracy plaza background. CENTER: a stack of three layered horizontal panels — top panel shows a small textile factory silhouette with a sewing machine, middle panel shows a heavy steel mill smokestack, bottom panel shows a single skyscraper outline with a downward red arrow (suggesting growth then crisis). Color palette: cold gray + navy + a single crimson accent on the arrow. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

outro.tip_body: 심화에서는 5개년 계획 차수별 주력 산업, 자금 확보 방안 3가지(한일수교·베트남파병·파독), 3저 호황의 3요소, 우루과이 라운드 시기가 자주 출제.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized open Korean classical book icon next to a small silhouette of a factory smokestack and a coin stack (no readable text). Cream #F2EDE3 base + amber #C77B3D accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image.
